Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
\\$files = @\(
    'C:\\Users\\wilmi\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Proyecto Licores Maduro\\frontend\\dashboard.html',
    'C:\\Users\\wilmi\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Proyecto Licores Maduro\\frontend\\index.html'
\)
foreach \(\\$f in \\$files\) {
    \\$content = Get-Content \\$f -Raw -Encoding UTF8
    if \(\\$content -notlike '*i18n.js*'\) {
        \\$content = \\$content -replace 'src=\\"js/api\\.js\\"', 'src=\\"js/i18n.js\\"></script><script src=\\"js/api.js\\"'
        Set-Content \\$f \\$content -Encoding UTF8 -NoNewline
        Write-Host 'Updated:' \(Split-Path \\$f -Leaf\)
    }
}
")

Bash(powershell -Command "
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
\\$zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\('C:\\Users\\wilmi\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Proyecto Licores Maduro\\TRACKING_2.docx'\)
\\$entry = \\$zip.GetEntry\('word/document.xml'\)
\\$reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\(\\$entry.Open\(\)\)
\\$xml = \\$reader.ReadToEnd\(\)
\\$reader.Close\(\)
\\$zip.Dispose\(\)
\\$text = \\$xml -replace '<[^>]+>', ' '
\\$text = \\$text -replace '\\s+', ' '
\\$text.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(8000, \\$text.Length\)\)
")

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$dbPath = 'C:\\Users\\wilmi\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Proyecto Licores Maduro\\Freight_Forwarders_Wilmin\\FREIGHT_Prog.accdb'
\\$conn = New-Object System.Data.OleDb.OleDbConnection\(\\"Provider=Microsoft.ACE.OLEDB.12.0;Data Source=\\$dbPath;\\"\)
\\$conn.Open\(\)
\\$schema = \\$conn.GetOleDbSchemaTable\([System.Data.OleDb.OleDbSchemaGuid]::Tables, \\$null\)
\\$tables = @\(\)
foreach\(\\$row in \\$schema.Rows\) { \\$tables += \\$row['TABLE_NAME'] }
\\$conn.Close\(\)
\\$tables | Sort-Object
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "
\\$acc = New-Object -ComObject Access.Application
\\$acc.Visible = \\$false
\\$acc.OpenCurrentDatabase\('C:\\Users\\wilmi\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Proyecto Licores Maduro\\Freight_Forwarders_Wilmin\\FREIGHT_Prog.accdb'\)
\\$db = \\$acc.CurrentDb\(\)
\\$cnt = \\$db.Containers\('Forms'\).Documents.Count
Write-Output \\"Form count: \\$cnt\\"
for \(\\$i = 0; \\$i -lt \\$cnt; \\$i++\) {
  Write-Output \\$db.Containers\('Forms'\).Documents\(\\$i\).Name
}
\\$acc.Quit\(\)
" 2>&1)
